name: Platformer
short_description: Explore a new world, traverse randomly generated seamlessly wrapping landscapes, fight or trap monsters, dig for materials, craft equipment, find treasure and trinkets to increase your strength, build a house to protect yourself at night, dig deep to find greater challenges, unique weapons and more!
detailed_description:
3Elements presents Platformer!

What kind of mystery is hidden in the world of Platformer?

A day and night system that will have you crafting torches from animal fat to see at night.

Continuous scrolling huge worlds, multiple biomes, deep oceans, vast skies, unique enemies, weapons, tools, and more!

Collect ore and create armor, fight monsters and build a base

Trap animals that are too fast for you to chase

Find equipment to become stronger and faster

Decorate your house with furniture, customize your character, and play with your friends!

This game is not complete!

Platformer is made by a single developer with their free time, please be patient for new updates.

Key Elements

  • Sandbox crafting survival system

  • Randomly generated looping worlds

  • Customizable characters

  • Unique monsters and weapons

  • Free updates

  • Multiplayer
